title: Is there a maximum number of items per board?

posts.author: mw01 (MW)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Wondering if there is a maximum number of items that can be added per board. We using automations, include many different file attachments and are over 7,000 items in our system with 20 columns. I had seen somewhere on a previous topic that someone started struggling once they had around 10,000 items on a board.

Anyone else run into this and any performance issues?

posts.author: TJ_S (TJS)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.

I had the same issue. I reached out to Monday support and they sent me this information. I hope this helps your inquiry

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
